purpose: Canonical capability-module catalog for OPL-hosted scholarly skills that can be discovered by OPL Atlas, packaged by OPL Pack, prepared through OPL runtime env, invoked by OPL Runway, and consumed by domain agents as refs-only candidate outputs.
machine_boundary: This contract describes independent capability modules and their descriptor, dependency, run-context, artifact, receipt, and quality-evidence refs. It does not add an eleventh OPL brand module, execute domain stages, write domain truth, mutate artifact bodies, schedule runtime attempts, sign owner receipts, create typed blockers, or claim runtime, domain, quality, artifact, publication, App, or production readiness.

dependency_profile_refs: opl runtime env prepare --domain scholarskills --profile display --platform <platform> --requirement-profile <path> --paper-root <path> --json
run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile display --json

display_quality_floor_policy.ai_executor_freedom: AI may choose the most suitable figure form, layout, panel hierarchy, and rendering backend from paper-local claims and evidence; this policy only raises the quality floor.

external_learning_refs.pattern: discoverable skill pack with provenance and topic-specific scientific communication skills
figure contract before plotting, backend-specific execution, and final visual QA
reference-driven retriever, planner, stylist, visualizer, and critic pipeline
multi-candidate academic illustration generation with critic rounds
reference style target plus reviewer preserve list to prevent drift
small hard plotting rules for vector export, color, size, typography, and parameter blocks

scientific_figure_quality_floor_policy.ai_executor_freedom: AI may choose the most suitable figure form, layout, panel hierarchy, and rendering backend from paper-local claims and evidence; this policy only raises the quality floor.

source_patterns: Haojae/scipilot-figure-skill: argument-first chart recommendation, visual QA preview, programmatic audit, and grayscale/color-vision checks
littlepeachs/NaturePanelForge: panel image to executable plotting code review loop
Marsilea-viz/marsilea: declarative composable complex heatmap and oncoprint planning
Boom5426/Awesome-Virtual-Cell: curated scientific figure reference examples for style brief and visual QA

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile tables --json

source_patterns: Master-cai/Research-Paper-Writing-Skills: table shell and paper-claim alignment
Ar9av/PaperOrchestra: metric extraction and table/LaTeX sanity discipline
Papers-with-Code/SOTA: result registry pattern for benchmark-aware table metric refs

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile stats --json

source_patterns: Ar9av/PaperOrchestra: analysis plan decomposition and reviewer loop
Imbad0202/academic-research-skills: reproducibility and statistical-review checklist as owner-gate input
Papers-with-Code/SOTA: dataset metric benchmark and result registry pattern for method/result comparison refs

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile omics --json

source_patterns: Marsilea-viz/marsilea: composable omics heatmap and annotation visualization plan
Boom5426/Awesome-Virtual-Cell: pathway and cell-model context refs with source inclusion discipline

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile lit --json
opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile write --json
opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile review --json
opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile submit --json

publication_readiness_authority.reason: Scholar Submit may prepare refs-only submission candidates, but journal submission and publication readiness remain with the domain owner and human gate.

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile data --json

sources.pattern: metadata scraping, paper library organization, tags/folders/notes, and export-oriented source metadata
raw materials, experimental logs, agent log aggregation, and structured manuscript input refs without becoming study truth
paper metadata, dataset/source manifest, run log, review summary, and resumable artifact bundle structure
systematic review protocol, inclusion/exclusion criteria, data extraction schema, and quality appraisal refs for SLR data handoff
dataset metric benchmark and result registry patterns as refs-only comparison inputs

retention_closeout_policy.default_completed_project_policy: Prefer semantic reproducibility over byte preservation of historical process bodies. Preserve current cohort bodies hot; migrate useful historical information into semantic capsules; keep byte-level capsules only for active analysis, legal/regulatory retention, external handoff, or explicit owner decision; delete covered raw history and rebuildable caches.
retention_closeout_policy.no_authority_policy: Scholar Data may propose closeout refs and catalog shape, but cannot move, thin, delete, compact, publish, sign owner receipt, create typed blocker, or waive reproducibility.

run_context_refs: opl runtime env run-context --domain scholarskills --profile intake --json

sources.pattern: adapter handoff should expose input contract, dry-run readback, adoption contract, and scope boundary before writes
host-agent executable skills with deterministic helpers, schemas, halt rules, validate-only phases, and package input boundaries
single command modes, source paper metadata, output roots, dry-run/live contract distinction, and generated run logs
